steps.name: approval-and-host-preflight
steps.summary: Confirmed approval boundary and completed local preflight: npm run test, lint, typecheck, build, and docker compose config passed without running ssh oci.

steps.name: server-compose-runtime
steps.summary: Prepared the server-local H-Log Compose bundle on the approved OCI host and verified remote docker compose config/ps. Compose services are hlog-nginx, hlog-web, hlog-postgres, and hlog-redis; config publishes only Nginx ingress and no services were started or restarted.
